texto: Everyone says your first time should be magical. You should be in love. You should feel safe. Because you can't go back once you've done it. That will always be your first time. Years later this is what I'll remember as my first time. That inflated sensation is long gone. Now I just feel nauseous
autor: its the feeling I get when reality dawns.
explicacao: Orientação direta de its the feeling I get when reality dawns. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Everyone says your first time should be magical. You should be in love. You should feel safe. Bec…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, kerry-cohen, easy, útil em momentos de easy.
